title: Fix and complete Deeds platform features

requirements.text: Fix the Memory Jars feature so it appears and functions correctly: users can save deeds from others into a personal scrapbook, toggle public/private visibility, and the original poster is notified when their deed is saved.

quotes: Memory Jars feature not appearing in current build

acceptanceCriteria: Memory Jar entries appear in the MemoryJarView component with saved posts displayed as polaroid-style cards
Users can save a post to their Memory Jar from the feed via the PostCard action button
Memory Jar has a public/private toggle accessible from the profile page
A notification is sent to the original poster when their deed is saved to someone's Memory Jar
MemoryJarPostCard renders correctly with photo/video/caption and author info
Remove button on MemoryJarPostCard deletes the entry from the jar

requirements.text: Fix the Profile page so it loads and displays correctly: show the user's avatar, posts, albums, follower/following counts, notifications, memory jar, profile picture upload option, and status update option.

quotes: Profile page showing nothing when clicked

acceptanceCriteria: Profile page renders without a blank screen for authenticated users
Avatar, display name, bio, follower count, and following count are visible
User's posts are listed on the profile page
Profile picture upload button is present and functional
Status update button opens the UpdateStatusModal
Memory Jar section is accessible from the profile page

requirements.text: Fix deed categories on the Deeds/feed page: implement AI-style random category assignment so that when a user creates a post, category options are dynamically generated and displayed for selection rather than failing to load.

quotes: Deed categories not loading on the Deeds page
AI-generated deed categories: built-in AI randomly decides category options on the Deeds page

acceptanceCriteria: When the CreatePostModal opens, a set of category options is displayed for the user to choose from
Category options are randomized/rotated from a curated pool of deed-related categories (e.g., Kindness, Community, Family, Health, Environment, Creativity, Education, Support)
Selected category is saved with the post and displayed as a badge on PostCard
Categories do not fail to load or show empty states

requirements.text: Implement the Profile Report Card feature: a weekly summary card on the user's profile that reflects their own activity stats (posts made, deeds completed, likes received, etc.) with a user-selectable grading scale (letter grade A-F, star rating 1-5, or percentage 0-100%). The report card has a public/private toggle.

quotes: Profile Report Card: AI-generated weekly options for peer review, reflects own activity stats, user chooses letter/star/percentage grading, public/private setting

acceptanceCriteria: A Report Card section appears on the profile page
The card displays weekly stats: number of posts, deeds completed, likes received, and kindness matches
User can select their preferred grading scale (letter, star, or percentage) from a settings toggle
The computed grade/score is displayed prominently on the card based on the selected scale
A public/private toggle controls whether the report card is visible to other users
Report card data refreshes weekly (based on the current week's activity)

requirements.text: Implement the Deeds Bar on the profile page: a 19-hour daily activity tracker displayed only on the profile page, showing floating bear, pineapple, and monkey head icons against a light baby blue lightning-bolt background, tracking daily app usage progress.

quotes: Deeds Bar on profile page: 19-hour daily tracker, floating bear/pineapple/monkey head icons, light baby blue lightning background

acceptanceCriteria: Deeds Bar component is rendered exclusively on the Profile page
The bar displays a light baby blue lightning background
Floating bear, pineapple, and monkey head emoji/icon elements animate within the bar
The bar visually represents progress through a 19-hour daily usage window using the useDeedsUsage hook data
Progress indicator updates as the user's session time accumulates throughout the day

requirements.text: Implement a lock screen overlay that appears on every page when the user reaches the 19-hour daily usage limit. The overlay displays a message about the daily limit and requires the user to click any bold letter in the terms/acceptance text to dismiss and continue.

quotes: Lock screen overlay when 19-hour daily limit is reached, shown on every page; user can click any bold letter to accept terms and continue

acceptanceCriteria: A full-screen overlay appears automatically when daily usage reaches 19 hours (tracked by useDeedsUsage hook)
The overlay is shown on every page/route when the limit is reached
The overlay contains a message about the daily limit with key terms displayed in bold
Clicking any bold letter word in the message dismisses the overlay and allows the user to continue
Dismissal state is stored in sessionStorage so the overlay does not re-appear until the next day
The overlay has a visually distinct design consistent with the Deeds app aesthetic

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
Generate migration.mo only if existing backend state types are changed
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket or push notification infrastructure
External AI/LLM service integration for category generation — use a curated random pool instead
Redesigning existing working features (Feed, Blog, Marketplace, Live)
Any new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity

required: Cartoon bear head icon with friendly expression on transparent background (bear-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Cartoon pineapple character head icon on transparent background (pineapple-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Cartoon monkey head icon with playful expression on transparent background (monkey-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Light baby blue abstract lightning bolt pattern background tile (lightning-bg.dim_800x400.png)
